title: Maya Prophecy: The Katun Wheel
description: Maya cyclical prophecy: each 20-year katun brings specific events, and history repeats when the same katun returns.
introduction: Maya cyclical prophecy: each 20-year katun brings specific events, and history repeats when the same katun returns.

translation.text: When Katun 13 Ahau returns, there will be great suffering. When Katun 8 Ahau returns, there will be abundance.
